plantumlCode:
@startuml
scale max 1890x2917

package "Processing Unit (400)" {
  rectangle "Data Interface\n(410)" as 410
  rectangle "Posture Analysis Engine\n(420)" as 420
  rectangle "Alert Logic\n(430)" as 430
  rectangle "Control Interface\n(440)" as 440

  410 -> 420
  420 -> 430
  430 -> 440
}

cloud "Posture Sensor Array\n(200)" as 200
cloud "Alert Module\n(100)" as 100

200 -> 410 : Sensor Data
440 -> 100 : Control Signal

@enduml

@startuml
scale max 1890x2917

state "Monitoring" as Monitoring
state "Alerting" as Alerting

[*] --> Monitoring : System Power On

Monitoring --> Monitoring : Posture Correct
Monitoring --> Alerting : Incorrect Posture Detected

Alerting --> Monitoring : Posture Corrected
Alerting --> Monitoring : Alert Timeout

@enduml

@startuml
scale max 1890x2917

rectangle "Posture Sensor Array\n(200)" as 200
rectangle "Processing Unit\n(400)" as 400
rectangle "Alert Module\n(100)" as 100
rectangle "Power Supply\n(300)" as 300

200 --> 400 : Sensor Data
400 --> 100 : Control Signal

300 -u-> 200
300 -r-> 400
300 -d-> 100

@enduml
